overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The scene features massive holographic fish swimming between neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, and transitions from outdoor plazas to covered walkways and elevated ramps. The footage is from a video game engine with cinematic ray-traced lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered concrete stairway ascending through a futuristic city environment. Giant holographic fish swim overhead in the rainy night sky, while neon lights illuminate the tropical plants lining the path. The camera moves steadily upward toward an open plaza.

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open urban plaza with wet reflective pavement, the camera turns right along a path lined with digital billboards and advertising kiosks. A massive glass skyscraper with vertical yellow neon strips dominates the right side, while holographic fish continue swimming overhead in the rainy night.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway featuring glowing square floor panels that illuminate the path. The environment transitions from open rain to sheltered space under a curved architectural canopy, approaching an elevated ramp with glowing cyan rail lighting.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated curved walkway with prominent glowing cyan neon rails, the camera moves through a canyon of towering skyscrapers. The giant holographic orange fish swims past closely on the right side, while the blue fish remains visible in the distance. The wet walkway surface reflects the intense cyan lighting as rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete ascent into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban canyon. It begins by climbing a covered stairway lined with tropical plants, moving steadily upward while giant holographic fish swim through the rainy night sky. As the camera emerges into an open plaza, the scene shifts across wet, reflective pavement and past digital billboards toward a massive glass skyscraper defined by vertical yellow neon strips. The perspective then transitions from the open rain into a sheltered walkway with glowing square floor panels, leading toward an elevated ramp. Finally, the camera glides along a curved walkway bounded by glowing cyan rails, passing closely beneath a massive orange holographic fish as the surrounding skyscrapers tower overhead.
